title: vangueria cinnamomea
intro: Vangueria cinnamomea, also known as the "Yellow Plum" or "Horn of Adam," is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Vangueria cinnamomea include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Vangueria cinnamomea are typically made from its leaves and roots, which can be dried, powdered, or made into teas or infusions for medicinal use.
